projects.deleteDescription: This permanently removes the project and its pages from your workspace.
projects.description: Manage your landing page workspaces, organize campaigns, and keep launch surfaces tidy.
projects.emptyDescription: Adjust your search or create a new project to start fresh.
projects.renameDescription: Rename the project label used across your dashboard.
projects.title: Projects

settingsPage.title: Settings
settingsPage.description: Manage the account identity used across your dashboard.
settingsPage.securityDescription: Session and access controls are protected by Supabase.
settingsPage.name: Name

previewPage.title: Live Preview
previewPage.description: Preview structured AI landing page JSON across desktop, tablet, and mobile without entering editor mode.
previewPage.starterPreviewNotice: Showing the starter preview. Open a saved landing page from a project to preview the generated page.

analyticsPage.title: Analytics
analyticsPage.description: Track visits, conversions, devices, traffic sources, funnels, and AI-powered conversion recommendations.

publishingPage.title: Publishing & Domains
publishingPage.description: Publish landing pages, manage public URLs, configure custom domains, and tune SEO metadata for production delivery.
publishingPage.seoDescription: Metadata, Open Graph, Twitter cards, and indexing controls.
publishingPage.pagePublishedDescription: Your landing page is live and ready to share.
publishingPage.emptyPagesDescription: Publish a page from the editor and it will appear here.
publishingPage.metaPixelDescription: Connect a separate Meta Pixel to each published landing page by entering its numeric Pixel ID.
publishingPage.metaPixelEmpty: Publish a landing page first, then connect its Meta Pixel here.
publishingPage.metaPixelEvents: Automatically sends PageView, ViewContent, CTA click, and Lead events after visitor consent.
publishingPage.metaPixelSavedDescription: Tracking settings were updated for this landing page.
publishingPage.metaPixelSaveFailed: Meta Pixel could not be saved
publishingPage.metaPixelInvalid: Enter a valid numeric Pixel ID before enabling tracking.
